title: Lara (group)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] group|the [[Lara|student]]}}
[[File:AceBilbringi.png|thumb|right|280px|The ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' escorting the [[Juno (cargo ferry group)|Juno]] and Lara groups from the station [[Bilbringi V]].]]
'''Lara''' group was a pair of [[Modular conveyor]]s that served with the [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] company [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]], owned by the [[Azzameen family]].

After the [[Imperialization/Legends|Imperialization]] of all Azzameen assets, including those held by their trading company, the ships of Lara were let go, though [[Aeron Azzameen]], the [[Gender/Legends|daughter]] of former company owner [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas]], would maintain contact with the pair of ships. Later, the group, paired together with the [[Cargo ferry]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] of [[Juno (cargo ferry group)|Juno]] group, absconded with supplies from [[Viraxo Industries]]' [[Industrial complex|orbital complex]] [[VXO-33274]] following a raid by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], a decorated [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]], in a mission to secure supplies for the Alliance presence on [[Vergesso Base]], located in the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]]. Despite interference from the [[Viraxo]] forces, as well as forces from [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], the supplies were delivered successfully.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
